purpose: Resolve a NOUN stem + possessive enclitic into possessor+base. POS-gated: never on a verb.
gate: token QAC POS must be nominal (N/ADJ/PN); on POS=V the enclitic is subject/object (we knew, created you) NOT possessive -> skip
forbidden: possessive gloss on a verb (عَلِمْنَا != our knowledge)
guess base gloss when stem unknown
